description: COBOL 74 period-scoped IF without END-IF — nested IF terminated by period
notes: A=5, B=3. Outer IF true (5>3), inner IF true (5>4), so WS-RESULT='INNER-YES'. The period after INNER-NO terminates BOTH IFs. This is classic COBOL 74 code that most parsers mishandle — the period closes ALL open IF scopes.
